text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Though I'm only lifting the dumbbell ever so
slightly, my body's really heating up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! You know, I figured this slow-paced
training would suit you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Let's take it slow and keep adding light weights. This is focus training, after all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Keep this up and you'll slim down in no time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Wonderful! I'm so grateful to have you here with
me, Ryan. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Without you, I'd certainly be plumper around the
middle.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Nah! All I do is show up and give you that little
extra push.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You would've figured it out on your own sooner
or later, no sweat.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
After all, you work your tail off no matter what
you do. Trust me, I've seen you putting in the
effort for years!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm happy to have you counting on me like this,
though!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! And with you here, I feel I can work all the
harder.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: All right! How 'bout we do some squats next?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Nice, that's some good form! You're getting it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright's weightlifting efforts pay
dividends, and her weight loss plan is a success!
